name: Charmeleon
flavor: If it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings.

ability.name: Ignition
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may take a [Fire] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your Active [Fire] Pokémon.
